title: Reverse Optimization
description: A collection of mods for Fabric that will optimize your Minecraft and add convenience to your game.
body:
This collection of mods is designed for those who want to improve the performance of their Minecraft, make the gameplay more comfortable and add new interesting mechanics. It includes mods aimed at increasing FPS, eliminating lags, as well as useful utilities for inventory management, crafting and construction. All mods are carefully selected for compatibility with each other and stable operation even on weak PCs. I wish you a pleasant game with my build. By ReVerse63.

Main build goals:
- Performance Optimization: Increased FPS and reduced lag due to improvements in graphics and resource handling.
- Interface usability: Improved inventory management, quick recipes and automatic sorting of items.
- Nice interface: Included with this build are several texturepacks: Dark Mode - which adds a dark theme to the interfaces and texturepacks connecting glass, bookshelves, etc.
